generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder behind the gearbox of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for measuring motor current in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current data from physical sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance MeasuredPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance MeasuredSecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data derived from motor current and position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredCurrentData, MeasuredPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredPositionData, MeasuredSecondaryPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance SysML_BDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling
]

instance SysML_IBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance SysMLModeling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling of robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance SimulinkSimulation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for multi-physics simulation of friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance AASDataLinking : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for linking data to sources and processing components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTDataStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for visualizing data traces"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhancement of robot motion accuracy through friction model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of data traces in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction identification insights used to adjust robot control parameters for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Parameter updates based on friction model outputs for improved motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized data traces for monitoring robot joint friction"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing for continuous friction model identification during robot operation, with no specific frequency specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of physical robot components (motor, gearboxes, encoders), MQTT-streamed sensor data, processing components executing Simulink models and SysML-based calculations, and dashboard visualization for integrated data representation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated stage, covering continuous monitoring and model refinement during operational use of the robot to account for wear, tool changes, and application variations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation via comparison of simulated data (from friction models) versus measured reference data to assess accuracy, with models refined based on deviations to improve motion control precision."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to the digital shadow system."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards for modeling and data structure integration."
]
